---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

<!-- One sentence: what is the feature? -->

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who needs it and why? -->
<!-- e.g., "As a speedcuber practicing BLD, I want to... so that I can..." -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Be as specific as possible. -->
<!-- Include keyboard shortcuts, UI layout ideas, output format, etc. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you seen this in csTimer, TwistyTimer, CubeDesk, or another tool? How do they do it? -->

## 📊 Priority / Impact

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — blocks my workflow entirely
- [ ] 🟡 High — would significantly improve my practice
- [ ] 🟢 Nice to have — small quality-of-life improvement

## 🧩 Affected Puzzle / Event

<!-- Which event(s) does this apply to? -->
- [ ] 3x3
- [ ] 2x2
- [ ] 4x4+
- [ ] Pyraminx / Skewb / Megaminx
- [ ] BLD / MBLD
- [ ] FMC
- [ ] All events

## 💬 Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to reference implementations, etc. -->
